column2: Pre-Hung Wood Front Door | M580E | Double | BGW Doors
column3:
Brighten your entry with this premium exterior door, designed as a classic exterior front door with crescent glass. Crafted as a mahogany wood entry door, it forms a front door with glass that illuminates your home while maintaining privacy and elegance.

Available as a single door or double door, this pre-hung exterior door supports easy installation and long-term performance. Its solid construction ensures a reliable front door for home improvements while offering visual appeal.

This premium exterior door combines style and durability. Whether chosen as a single door or double door, it enhances your entryway as a stunning exterior front door.

Door Orientation: Some products are designed for a specific hand—right or left. To determine the correct orientation, stand on the exterior side of your door and check which side the hinges are located. Hinges on the right indicate a right-handed door; hinges on the left indicate a left-handed door.

This pre-hung exterior door is eligible for Flat Rate shipping at checkout.

Key Features

  • Mahogany solid wood engineering structural door (single door or double door)
  • Raised moulding
  • Triple-glazed glass for a stylish front door with glass
  • Black caming
  • Floating panels
  • Wood T-astragal finished to match
  • Included: jamb, casing, and molding for easy installation as a pre-hung exterior door

Total Dimensions

  • 37 1/4" x 81" x 5 1/4" (custom single door, please call to order)
  • 61 1/4" x 81" x 5 1/4"
  • 65 1/4" x 81" x 5 1/4"
  • 61 1/4" x 97" x 5 1/4"
  • 73 1/4" x 97" x 5 1/4"

Pre-hung doors ship "knocked down" to prevent damage and ease handling at delivery. All doors are machined, and a knocked-down pre-hung exterior door can be assembled in 10–15 minutes. Please note, handles sold separately.

column2: Pre-Hung Wood Front Door | M1012 | Double | BGW Doors
column3:
Upgrade your entryway with this premium exterior door set, crafted as a modern exterior front door. Made as mahogany wood entry doors with glass panels, they form a front door with glass that provides natural light while enhancing style and security.

Available as a single door or double door, this pre-hung exterior door set allows for simple installation and long-lasting durability. Its solid wood construction ensures a dependable front door for home upgrades while complementing your home’s architecture.

This premium exterior door set delivers elegance and functionality. Whether chosen as a single door or double door, it serves as a striking exterior front door that elevates curb appeal.

Key Features

  1. African Mahogany Construction
    Crafted from premium African Mahogany, this exterior front door showcases a bold, distinct wood grain that exudes contemporary elegance.
  2. Dark Walnut Finish
    The dark walnut finish complements the natural beauty of the Mahogany, ensuring a sophisticated look that blends seamlessly with modern or transitional home designs.
  3. Frosted Glass for Privacy
    Enjoy natural light without compromising privacy. The frosted glass insert makes this front door with glass both stylish and secure for your entryway.
  4. Single Bore & Stainless Steel Pulls
    The single bore design maintains a clean, uncluttered appearance, and the included stainless steel door pulls provide a modern finishing touch for either a single door or double door setup.
  5. Complete Pre-Hung Kit
    Each order includes a wood T-astragal (finished to match), jamb, casing, and molding. Handles are sold separately, and the pre-hung exterior door is delivered “knocked down” for safe handling and easy assembly.

Door Orientation

Some doors are designed for a specific orientation—right-handed or left-handed. To find which orientation you need:

  1. Stand on the exterior side of the exterior front door.
  2. Check which side the door hinges are on:
    • If the hinges are on the right, you need a right-handed door.
    • If the hinges are on the left, you need a left-handed door.

Available Dimensions

  • 61 1/4" x 81" x 5 1/4"
  • 73 1/4" x 81" x 5 1/4"
  • 61 1/4" x 97" x 5 1/4"
  • 73 1/4" x 97" x 5 1/4"

Each pre-hung exterior door comes with all necessary components and can be easily assembled in about 10–15 minutes.

Shipping & Delivery

This premium exterior door is available for pre-sale and will be delivered in approximately 8 weeks. It also qualifies for Flat Rate Shipping at checkout, simplifying the delivery process.

Custom Sizes & Support

For custom sizes or any questions, please reach out:
Phone: (909) 789-1818
Email: info@bgwdoors.com

Our team at BGW Doors is ready to help you find the perfect contemporary mahogany wood entry door to enhance your home’s curb appeal. Upgrade your entryway with the M1012 Contemporary Mahogany Door—where modern design meets timeless craftsmanship.

column2: Bi-Fold Aluminum Patio Door | Interior Exterior | BGW Doors
column3:
About This Product

Transform your patio into a stunning, functional, and inviting living space with the BGW Doors Thermal Break Aluminum Folding Glass Door. Designed with modern architecture in mind, this folding glass door creates a seamless transition between your indoor and outdoor areas while maximizing natural light and usable space. Built with durable, powder-coated aluminum and energy-efficient insulated glass, BGW Doors folding systems deliver long-lasting performance, smooth operation, and everyday comfort. Whether you’re upgrading your home or opening up your patio, this door offers the perfect balance of style, strength, and functionality.

Highlights

  • Thermal-break aluminum frame for improved energy efficiency

  • Dual tempered, double-pane insulated glass

  • Argon-filled gas for superior insulation performance

  • Bottom-hung rolling system for smooth and stable operation

  • Low-profile 75-series track system

  • Multi-point locking system for added security

  • Matching color hardware and handles included

  • Powder-coated aluminum for scratch resistance and durability

  • Moisture-resistant and rust-resistant construction

  • Easy maintenance

  • Brings in more natural light and expands usable living space

  • All necessary hardware included for complete installation

column2: Pre-Hung Wood Front Door | M4P | Double | BGW Doors
column3:

Available as a single door or double door, this pre-hung exterior door allows for simple installation and long-term performance. Its fiberglass construction delivers strength, low maintenance, and long-lasting reliability compared to traditional wood doors.

This premium exterior door blends contemporary design and durable craftsmanship. Whether selected as a single door or double door, it provides both visual appeal and functional excellence, creating a standout exterior front door for your home.

  • Dark mahogany finish (Wine Red)
  • Triple glazed front door with glass featuring granite, glue chip, and beveled glass with Low-E tempered performance

column3:
The ID07 is single only door.  Perfect for a brownstone, or a side door for a larger standalone home to accompany a front iron double door.  

For custom sizes or questions please reach out to (909) 789-1818 or info@bgwdoors.com.

This premium iron door is engineered for strength, security, and long-term performance, making it an ideal solution for iron entry doors, exterior entry doors, and replacement entry doors. Constructed from heavy-duty 14-gauge steel, the door features a polyurethane-filled core that enhances structural integrity while delivering excellent energy efficiency.

Each door is equipped with tempered E-glass, fully sealed and weatherstripped to help prevent air and water leakage. The glass panels can be opened independently from the doors, offering flexibility for ventilation without compromising security. A precision-designed door threshold system helps prevent water infiltration, ensuring dependable protection in all weather conditions.

All doors utilize durable barrel hinges for smooth operation and long-term reliability. Double door configurations include a pre-insulated flush bolt system, providing added stability and insulation when closed. For homes in high-risk weather zones, custom designs can be manufactured to meet hurricane-resistant requirements.

Designed to elevate curb appeal while delivering commercial-grade durability, this front door is ideal for homeowners seeking a secure, energy-efficient, and visually striking iron door solution. Whether you are upgrading an existing entrance or installing a new exterior entry door, this model delivers performance you can trust.

Elevate your home’s entry with this premium exterior door, designed as a striking exterior front door that combines timeless elegance with unmatched durability. Crafted as a mahogany wood entry door, it features rich African Mahogany, raised panels, and triple-glazed clear glass, creating a sophisticated front door with glass that fills your entryway with natural light while maintaining privacy. This design enhances curb appeal and complements both traditional and contemporary architectural styles.

Available as a single door or double door, this pre-hung exterior door ensures straightforward installation and long-lasting performance. Its precise construction, floating panels, and carefully matched T-astragal make it a dependable front door for home improvements, blending both functional strength and visual refinement for years to come.

This premium exterior door delivers exceptional craftsmanship, elegance, and reliability for homeowners seeking style and durability. Whether selected as a single door or double door, it serves as a centerpiece exterior front door that elevates the overall look of any home while providing a durable, secure, and welcoming entryway.

  • Mahogany Solid wood engineering structural door
  • African Mahogany
  • Raised molding
  • Triple-glazed glass for a beautiful front door with glass
  • Silver caming
  • Floating panels
  • Wood T-astragal finished to match
  • Included: jamb, casing, and molding for a pre-hung exterior door

column2: Pre-Hung Iron Front Door | ID03 | Double | BGW Doors
column3:
For custom sizes or questions please reach out to (909) 789-1818 or info@bgwdoors.com. 

This premium double iron door is engineered for strength, security, and long-term performance, making it an ideal solution for iron entry doors, exterior entry doors, and replacement entry doors. Constructed from heavy-duty 14-gauge steel, the door features a polyurethane-filled core that enhances structural integrity while delivering excellent energy efficiency.

Each door is equipped with tempered E-glass, fully sealed and weatherstripped to help prevent air and water leakage. The glass panels can be opened independently from the doors, offering flexibility for ventilation without compromising security. A precision-designed door threshold system helps prevent water infiltration, ensuring dependable protection in all weather conditions.

All doors utilize durable barrel hinges for smooth operation and long-term reliability. Double door configurations include a pre-insulated flush bolt system, providing added stability and insulation when closed. For homes in high-risk weather zones, custom designs can be manufactured to meet hurricane-resistant requirements.

Designed to elevate curb appeal while delivering commercial-grade durability, this front door is ideal for homeowners seeking a secure, energy-efficient, and visually striking iron door solution. Whether you are upgrading an existing entrance or installing a new exterior entry door, this model delivers performance you can trust.

Browse our full collection of iron entry doors

***Some products are designed to be used specifically with either the right or left hand. To determine the correct orientation, stand on the exterior side of your door and look at it. The side on which the door hinges are located indicates whether it is a righthanded or lefthanded product.***  

 

This door is eligible for flat rate shipping at check out.

Due to the weight of these doors (800lbs-1,000lbs) we are unable to provide free shipping.  Instead, we have worked with our carrier and are able to offer three flat rates.  West Coast $700, Mountain and Midwest $1,000, and East Coast $1,200.  Please call for more information (909) 789-1818.

column2: Pre-Hung Iron Front Door | ID02 | Double | BGW Doors
column3:
For custom sizes or questions please reach out to (909) 789-1818 or info@bgwdoors.com. 

This premium double iron door is engineered for strength, security, and long-term performance, making it an ideal solution for iron entry doors, exterior entry doors, and replacement entry doors. Constructed from heavy-duty 14-gauge steel, the door features a polyurethane-filled core that enhances structural integrity while delivering excellent energy efficiency.

Each door is equipped with tempered E-glass, fully sealed and weatherstripped to help prevent air and water leakage. The glass panels can be opened independently from the doors, offering flexibility for ventilation without compromising security. A precision-designed door threshold system helps prevent water infiltration, ensuring dependable protection in all weather conditions.

All doors utilize durable barrel hinges for smooth operation and long-term reliability. Double door configurations include a pre-insulated flush bolt system, providing added stability and insulation when closed. For homes in high-risk weather zones, custom designs can be manufactured to meet hurricane-resistant requirements.

Designed to elevate curb appeal while delivering commercial-grade durability, this front door is ideal for homeowners seeking a secure, energy-efficient, and visually striking iron door solution. Whether you are upgrading an existing entrance or installing a new exterior entry door, this model delivers performance you can trust.

Explore more premium iron entry doors and exterior door solutions at BGW Doors

 

***Some products are designed to be used specifically with either the right or left hand. To determine the correct orientation, stand on the exterior side of your door and look at it. The side on which the door hinges are located indicates whether it is a righthanded or lefthanded product.***

 

This door is eligible for flat rate shipping at check out.

Check The Instruction Manual: Click Here

Due to the weight of these doors (800lbs-1,000lbs) we are unable to provide free shipping.  Instead we have worked with our carrier and are able to offer three flat rates.  West Coast $700, Mountain and Midwest $1,000, and East Coast $1,200.  Please call for more information (909) 789-1818.  

 

Total Dimensions:

61 1/4" x 97" x 6" 

73 1/4" x 97" x 6"

 

Please note, handles sold separately.

Elevate your home’s entry with this premium exterior door, designed as a striking exterior front door with crescent glass that combines timeless elegance with unmatched durability. Crafted as a mahogany wood entry door, it allows natural light through the crescent glass, creating a welcoming front door with glass that enhances your home’s entryway while maintaining privacy.

Available as a single door or double door, this pre-hung exterior door ensures straightforward installation and long-lasting performance. Its precise construction, floating panels, and high-quality joinery make it a dependable front door for home upgrades, blending both functional strength and visual appeal.

This premium exterior door delivers exceptional craftsmanship, elegance, and reliability for homeowners seeking style and durability. Whether chosen as a single door or double door, it stands out as a centerpiece exterior front door for any home.

Key Features

* Mahogany Solid wood engineering structural door

  • Elegant crescent glass panels create a refined front door with glass that balances natural light and privacy.
  • Rich Mahogany wood finish with a satin clear coat provides timeless curb appeal for any front door for home.
  • Prehung unit includes jamb, casing, and matching molding for easy installation as a pre-hung exterior door.

Highlights

  • Material: African Mahogany Solid wood engineering structural
  • Glass Type: Tempered triple-glazed decorative glass. 3/4" thick glass.
  • Finish: Dark Mahogany with protective satin topcoat
  • Construction: Floating panel design with wood T-astragal
  • Shipping: Pre-hung exterior door units ship “knocked down” for safe transit and quick assembly
